mapper.delete:
/* SQL ID : SrvyVwitmDAO.srvyQstnListVwitmDelete 설 명 : 설문문항목록보기항목삭제 */ DELETE FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_VWITM WHERE SRVY_QSTN_ID IN
#{item.srvyQstnId}
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : SrvyVwitmDAO.srvyVwitmList 설 명 : 설문보기항목목록조회 */ SELECT * FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_VWITM WHERE SRVY_QSTN_ID = #{srvyQstnId} ORDER BY VWITM_SEQNO
mapper.delete: /* SQL ID : SrvyVwitmDAO.srvyQstnListVwitmAllDelete 설 명 : 설문문항목록보기항목전체삭제 */ DELETE FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_VWITM WHERE SRVY_QSTN_ID IN ( SELECT SRVY_QSTN_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_QSTN QSTN JOIN TB_LMS_SRVYPPR SRVYPPR ON QSTN.SRVYPPR_ID = SRVYPPR.SRVYPPR_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY SRVY ON SRVYPPR.SRVY_ID = SRVY.SRVY_ID WHERE SRVY.SRVY_ID = #{srvyId} )
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : SrvyVwitmDAO.srvyVwitmMvmnSrvypprIdModify 설 명 : 설문보기항목설문지이동아이디수정 */ UPDATE ( SELECT VWITM.MVMN_SRVY_QSTN_ID AS MVMN_SRVY_QSTN_ID , 'NEXT' AS NEW_MVMN_SRVY_QSTN_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_VWITM VWITM JOIN ( SELECT A.SRVY_VWITM_ID FROM ( SELECT VWITM.SRVY_VWITM_ID , SRVYPPR.SRVY_SEQNO , (SELECT SRVY_SEQNO FROM TB_LMS_SRVYPPR WHERE SRVYPPR_ID = VWITM.MVMN_SRVY_QSTN_ID) AS MVMN_SRVY_SEQNO , NVL((SELECT 'N' FROM TB_LMS_SRVYPPR WHERE SRVYPPR_ID = VWITM.MVMN_SRVY_QSTN_ID), 'Y') AS SRVY_DELYN FROM TB_LMS_SRVYPPR SRVYPPR JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_QSTN QSTN ON SRVYPPR.SRVYPPR_ID = QSTN.SRVYPPR_ID AND QSTN.DELYN = 'N' AND QSTN.SRVY_MVMN_USEYN = 'Y' JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_VWITM VWITM ON QSTN.SRVY_QSTN_ID = VWITM.SRVY_QSTN_ID WHERE SRVYPPR.SRVY_ID = #{srvyId} AND VWITM.MVMN_SRVY_QSTN_ID NOT IN ('NEXT', 'END') ) A WHERE A.SRVY_SEQNO > A.MVMN_SRVY_SEQNO OR A.SRVY_DELYN = 'Y' ) A ON VWITM.SRVY_VWITM_ID = A.SRVY_VWITM_ID ) SET MVMN_SRVY_QSTN_ID = NEW_MVMN_SRVY_QSTN_ID
